Setup and build scripts for packaging and converting SVG files to PNG using py2app.


## Files
- **[setup.py](setup.py.md)**: Setup script for packaging the svg2png tool using py2app.
- **[svg2png.py](svg2png.py.md)**: Converts SVG files to PNG by generating and processing PDC files, with error handling and logging.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for converting SVG to PNG using py2app, with error handling for macholib issues.
